LinkedSQL.SQL: SELECT WR.WARRANT_ID AS "WR.WARRANT_ID" , WR.WARRANT_RETURNS_ID AS "WR.WARRANT_RETURNS_ID" , RC.RETURN_TYPE AS "RC.RETURN_TYPE" , WR.WARRANT_RETURN_DATE AS "WR.WARRANT_RETURN_DATE" , WR.RETURN_CODE AS "WR.RETURN_CODE" , WR.RETURN_CODE_COURT_CODE AS "WR.RETURN_CODE_COURT_CODE" , RC.RETURN_CODE_SUMMARY AS "RC.RETURN_CODE_SUMMARY" , WR.ADDITIONAL_INFORMATION AS "WR.ADDITIONAL_INFORMATION" , WR.NOTICE_REQUIRED AS "WR.NOTICE_REQUIRED" , WR.DEFENDANT_ID AS "WR.DEFENDANT_ID" , WR.VERIFICATION_DATE AS "WR.VERIFICATION_DATE" , WR.ERROR_INDICATOR AS "WR.ERROR_INDICATOR" , WR.APPOINTMENT_DATE AS "WR.APPOINTMENT_DATE" , WR.APPOINTMENT_TIME AS "WR.APPOINTMENT_TIME" , WR.CREATED_BY AS "WR.CREATED_BY" , ( SELECT NVL(DU.USER_SHORT_NAME, '') FROM DCA_USER DU WHERE DU.USER_ID = WR.CREATED_BY ) AS "WR.USERALIAS" , WR.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "WR.ADMIN_COURT_CODE" , WR.RECEIPT_DATE AS "WR.RECEIPT_DATE" , WR.TO_TRANSFER AS "WR.TO_TRANSFER" , W.CASE_NUMBER AS "W.CASE_NUMBER" , CE.EVENT_SEQ AS "CE.EVENT_SEQ" , COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ AS "COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ" , WR.ORA_ROWSCN AS "WR_ORA_ROWSCN" , RC.ORA_ROWSCN AS "RC_ORA_ROWSCN" , W.ORA_ROWSCN AS "W_ORA_ROWSCN" , CE.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CE_ORA_ROWSCN" , COE.ORA_ROWSCN AS "COE_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM WARRANT_RETURNS WR, WARRANTS W, RETURN_CODES RC, CASE_EVENTS CE, CO_EVENTS COE WHERE WR.WARRANT_ID = ${param.warrantID} AND WR.RETURN_CODE = RC.RETURN_CODE AND WR.RETURN_CODE_COURT_CODE = RC.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AND W.WARRANT_ID = WR.WARRANT_ID AND CE.EVENT_SEQ (+)= WR.EVENT_SEQ AND COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ (+)= WR.CO_EVENT_SEQ ORDER BY WR.ERROR_INDICATOR, WR.WARRANT_RETURN_DATE DESC

SELECT WR.WARRANT_RETURNS_ID AS "WR.WARRANT_RETURNS_ID" , 'WP' AS "OUTPUT.TYPE" , WO.FINAL_IND AS "OUTPUT.FINAL_IND" , TO_CHAR(WO.OUTPUT_ID) AS "OUTPUT.OUTPUT_ID" , 'Word Processing Output' AS "OUTPUT.DESCRIPTION" , TO_CHAR(WO.XMLSOURCE) AS "OUTPUT.DOCUMENT_ID" FROM WP_OUTPUT WO, WARRANT_RETURNS WR WHERE WR.WARRANT_ID = ${param.warrantID} AND WO.WARRANT_RETURNS_ID = WR.WARRANT_RETURNS_ID AND WO.OUTPUT_ID = (SELECT MAX(WO2.OUTPUT_ID) FROM WP_OUTPUT WO2 WHERE WO2.WARRANT_RETURNS_ID = WR.WARRANT_RETURNS_ID AND WO2.FINAL_IND = WO.FINAL_IND)

Query.SQL: SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') AS "PY.HW_PAYMENTS_EXIST" FROM PAYMENTS PY , WARRANTS W WHERE W.WARRANT_ID = ${param.warrantID} AND W.LOCAL_WARRANT_NUMBER IS NULL AND PY.SUBJECT_NO = W.WARRANT_NUMBER AND PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'HOME WARRANT' AND PY.ENFORCEMENT_COURT_CODE = W.ISSUED_BY

SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') AS "PY.FW_PAYMENTS_EXIST" FROM PAYMENTS PY , WARRANTS W WHERE W.WARRANT_ID = ${param.warrantID} AND W.LOCAL_WARRANT_NUMBER IS NOT NULL AND PY.SUBJECT_NO = W.LOCAL_WARRANT_NUMBER AND PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'FOREIGN WARRANT' AND PY.ENFORCEMENT_COURT_CODE = W.CURRENTLY_OWNED_BY

SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'N','Y') AS "W.WELSH_PARTIES" FROM WARRANTS W , CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR WHERE W.WARRANT_ID = ${param.warrantID} AND W.CASE_NUMBER IS NOT NULL AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER = W.CASE_NUMBER AND NVL(CPR.WELSH_INDICATOR,'N') = 'Y'

SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') AS "C.CONFIDENTIAL" FROM WARRANTS W , CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR WHERE W.WARRANT_ID = ${param.warrantID} AND W.CASE_NUMBER IS NOT NULL AND CPR.CASE_NUMBER = W.CASE_NUMBER AND NVL(CPR.CONFIDENTIAL,'N') = 'Y'
